agreement.agree_pdpa: I have read and accepted the terms and conditions of using the platform, including the privacy policy and personal data protection (PDPA), and I consent to the collection of my personal data as specified in the terms of service.
agreement.agree_marketing: I consent to the collection and disclosure of my personal data to Ampol Food Group, its affiliated companies, and platform service providers for marketing purposes and the provision of personalized benefits.
